task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from a full S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket-name/path/to/object') and extract only the bucket name
solution_criteria: Should correctly extract bucket names from S3 URIs in the format 's3://bucket-name/...' and handle bucket names with hyphens and numbers. Should not include the path after the bucket name.

task: Write a Python function that validates if a given string is a valid AWS IAM role ARN. A valid ARN should follow the pattern: arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name
solution_criteria: Function should return True for valid IAM role ARNs and False for invalid ones. Should validate the presence of all required components (arn:aws:iam, account-id as 12 digits, role/ prefix, and role name). Should handle edge cases like extra slashes or missing components.

task: Create a JSON CloudWatch Alarm configuration for monitoring EC2 CPU utilization that triggers when average CPU exceeds 80% over a 5-minute period
solution_criteria: JSON should include AlarmName, MetricName (CPUUtilization), Namespace (AWS/EC2), Statistic (Average), Period (300 seconds), EvaluationPeriods, Threshold (80), ComparisonOperator (GreaterThanThreshold), and AlarmActions. Should be valid CloudWatch alarm syntax.
